title: Sprattus Et Uxor.
content:
Jack Spratt could eat no fat,
	 His wife could eat no lean,
	 And so between them both
	 They licked the platter clean.

	    Sprattus horrescens adipem recusat,
	    Uxor et non vult tolerare macrum:
	    Conjuges digni! potu�re sic de-
	         tergere lancem.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Jacob Bigelow delivers a powerful performance in "Sprattus Et Uxor."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
